calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment (Notices)
Off Calendar Jun-19-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Farah Mubayed.
Dept. 514. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Kevin L. Elder, Esq. appeard with plaintiff Anais Dilberger, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Farah Mubayed.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on March 16, 2015 and served on March 26, 2015.
Statement of Damages was served on June 1, 2015 and filed on June 5, 2015.
Default was entered against defendant on July 14, 2015.
Dismissal with prejudice as to defendant Fox Rent-A-Car, Inc. was filed on 4/19/16.
DOE defendants were dismissed on 4/19/16.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Anais Dilberger, and against the Defaulted Defendant Farah Mubayed, as follows:

Damages - $190,038.08.
Prejudgment Interest - $60,661.55.
Costs - $1,214.64.
Total - $251,914.27.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
